creator: sziszi@petra.hos.u-szeged.hu
text:
Hi!

As for the "no localhost" problem, see the Errata file on
www.freebsd.org and correct the
entry in your /etc/rc.conf which says

network_interfaces="xl0 auto" to "xl0 lo0" This is a known problem in
-RELEASE, which is fixed in -STABLE. 

After this (and a reboot) try sysinstall again. Chances are things will
get all
right again.

Cheers!

Szilveszter ADAM
